entries.label: Unclear direction
entries.short: You are unsure where to go next.
entries.long: This feeling entry is used when direction is still blurry.

entries.label: Not sure which path to take.
entries.long: A short subtitle for the unclear direction card.

entries.label: Pressure
entries.short: Too many forces are pressing at once.
entries.long: Used when the user feels compressed by multiple demands.

entries.label: Stuck
entries.short: You are trying, but not moving.
entries.long: Used when motion feels blocked despite effort.

entries.label: Want change
entries.short: You want a shift, but fear is present.
entries.long: Used when change is wanted but resisted.

entries.label: Direction pressure
entries.short: Not knowing where to go feels heavy.

entries.label: Change career
entries.short: You want to move to another track.

entries.label: Which part feels more blocked right now?
entries.long: Question used when direction looks blocked.

entries.label: I cannot see a realistic path forward.
I do not know what I am actually good at.
I keep thinking, but still cannot decide.
Which pressure is biting hardest at the moment?
entries.long: Question used when pressure is dominant.

entries.label: Expectations from others feel too heavy.
Too many roles are stacking at once.
Context locked
entries.long: The user locked persona + reality context for this session.

entries.label: Feeling selected
entries.long: The user chose a feeling entry point for exploration.

entries.label: Keyword selected
entries.short: A keyword node was added to the trail.
entries.long: The user selected a keyword node and it became evidence for later mapping.

entries.label: Reflection updated
entries.short: A short reflection fragment was saved.
entries.long: The user updated a short optional reflection fragment.

entries.label: AI prompt generated
entries.short: A selectable AI prompt was generated.
entries.long: The system generated a selectable AI prompt from the current snapshot.

entries.label: AI option resolved
entries.short: An AI option was resolved into structured state.
entries.long: The system converted an AI option into keyword additions and next-state hints.

entries.label: Needs a roadmap first
entries.short: The user wants a roadmap first.
entries.long: This option indicates the user wants structure, sequencing, and clearer next steps.

entries.label: Needs clearer strengths
entries.short: The user wants clearer strengths first.
entries.long: This option indicates self-knowledge and strengths recognition should be explored first.

entries.label: Needs a clearer future picture
entries.short: The user wants a clearer future picture first.
entries.long: This option indicates longer-range direction ambiguity is dominant.

entries.label: Money pressure is strongest
entries.short: Money pressure feels strongest right now.
entries.long: This option points to financial pressure as the current dominant load.

entries.label: Expectation pressure is strongest
entries.short: Expectation pressure feels strongest right now.
entries.long: This option points to external/internal expectations as the dominant load.

entries.label: Role overload is strongest
entries.short: Too many roles feel strongest right now.
entries.long: This option points to multi-role overload as the dominant load.

entries.label: Trail compacted
entries.long: A compaction summary replaced older trail details while preserving audit metadata.

entries.label: Continue keyword exploration
entries.short: Keep narrowing the issue by selection.
entries.long: Recommended when there are selected signals but exploration can go deeper.

entries.label: Refresh AI prompt
entries.long: Recommended when the state is ready for another guided selection question.

entries.label: Review wheel preview
entries.short: Look at how current evidence maps.
entries.long: Recommended when the user has enough selected evidence to inspect the wheel.

entries.label: Ready to continue from the last context.
entries.short: The session has enough structure to resume directly.
entries.long: Used when the latest state is coherent and recent.

entries.label: Resume with structure first.
entries.short: A guided prompt is recommended before going deeper.
entries.long: Used when the session needs another guided selection step.
